comment: Has anyone heard anymore about the potential POSCO partnership? Seems like it’s been crickets since it was announced.

I was one of the people on the Chris Beach Trial for charges. I believe with everything Chris Beach is guilty as can be. Unfortunately I didn't feel there was concrete proof, but everything defiantly looked like it was true.
they need to step down now! this is disgusting
BP Whiting. I am sure there will be people at most gates if not all. Go show them your support!
This is disgusting! I assume this is why charges were brought against Chris Beach and Dave Williams

At midnight 3/19/2026 British Petroleum (BP) chose to lock out our 800+ union brothers and sisters at the Whiting facility. If you can go show support im sure the picket lines are forming as we speak.

How can we allow multiple union officers that made statements to the company that caused 6 members to be out of work for many months and 1 still currently out to stay in office!? Dave Williams, Chris Beach, and Josh Butts should be ashamed of themselves. Not only did they make statements to the company, but they gave false statements to the company. They straight up lied. they should resign and be back in the shop at best or shamed into finding a different job and not even be allowed back into our shops! 

"The Grievance Chair approached the company on May 5, 2025, and he shared the details of a conversation he had with Menear shortly after Menear had been removed as an assistant griever."

Shame on you Dave Williams! This would be a disgrace if any member did these actions, but completely disgusting for the Grievance Chair!
